subject: A massive fortified structure with organic spines and geometric panels dominates the frame under a blue-purple sky with floating rock formations; a tiny figure stands at the base
description: A sweeping wide-angle view of a colossal structure — its lower half composed of dark armored panels studded with triangular spines, its upper reaches dissolving into pale stone and floating rock formations against a blue-purple sky. Cables or chains drape from the structure's edges. The scale is communicated by a single tiny silhouetted figure standing at the lower right base of the structure. Distant floating stone columns are visible in the upper left. The palette shifts from dark orange-brown at the structure to pale blue-white at the sky.
foreground: dark armored structure with triangular spines and draping cables
background: pale blue-purple sky, floating stone formations, distant columns
emotion: awe, refuge at massive scale — the tiny figure underscores the enormity of the sanctuary
